name: Column / upright post
definition: Vertical load-bearing member: rack uprights and shelving posts

name: Beam / load member
definition: Horizontal load member: pallet rack load beams and shelf beams

name: Arm
definition: Cantilever arm carrying loads from a column

name: Support channel
definition: Channel-form support member under decks and panels
demo_note: Demo code: SNAP-1.0.0 names this role DKS (deck support member)
